lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Hello, [player name]. I'm [Paul/Adam], the Iron[man/woman] tutor. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Iron[men/women].

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: When you play as an Iron[man/woman], you do everything for yourself. You don't trade with other players, or take their items, or accept their help.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: As an Iron[man/woman], you choose to have these restrictions imposed on you, so everyone knows you're doing it properly.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you think you have what it takes, you can choose to become a Hardcore Iron[man/woman].

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: In addition to the standard restrictions, Hardcore Iron[men/women] only have one life. In the event of a dangerous death, your Hardcore Iron[men/women] status will be downgraded to that of a standard Iron[man/woman], and your

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: stats will be frozen on the Hardcore Iron [Man/Woman] hiscores.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you have some friends, you could stand alone... Together, as Group Ironmen. Group Ironmen have the same restrictions as regular Iron[men/women] except you can trade your items with each other!

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you are a daring bunch, you could even try Hardcore Group Ironmen. With Hardcore Group Ironmen you have a set number of lives, when they reach zero, you will become regular Group Ironmen.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you ever decided to invite experienced players to your group, you would become Unranked Group Ironmen, which are no longer shown on the Group Ironman hiscores.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: For the ultimate challenge, you can choose to become an Ultimate Iron[man/woman], a game mode inspired by the player IronNoBank.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: In addition to the standard restrictions, Ultimate Iron[men/women] are blocked from using the bank, and they drop all their items when they die.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: While you're on Tutorial Island, you can switch freely between being a standard Iron[man/woman], an Ultimate Iron[man/woman], a Hardcore Iron[man/woman], a Group Ironman, a Hardcore Group Ironman or a regular character.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Once you've left this island, you'll be able to find my colleague Adam in Lumbridge, but he'll only let you switch your restrictions downwards, not upwards.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: So he will let Hardcore Iron[men/women] or Ultimate Iron[men/women] downgrade to standard Iron[men/women], and he'll let all types of Iron[man/woman] become normal players.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to change my Iron[man/woman] mode.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Make sure you've got your Iron[man/woman] settings all sorted before you leave Tutorial Island. Some things can't be changed later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there [Paul/Adam].

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Hail, Iron[man/woman]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Iron[men/women].

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: When you play as an Iron[man/woman], you do everything for yourself. You don't trade with other players, or take their items, or accept their help.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: As an Iron[man/woman], you choose to have these restrictions imposed on you, so everyone knows you're doing it properly.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you think you have what it takes, you can choose to become a Hardcore Iron[man/woman].

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: In addition to the standard restrictions, Hardcore Iron[man/woman] only have one life. In the event of a dangerous death, your Hardcore Iron[man/woman] status will be downgraded to that of a standard Iron[man/woman], and your

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: stats will be frozen on the Hardcore Iron[man/woman] hiscores.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: For the ultimate challenge, you can choose to become an Ultimate Iron[man/woman], a game mode inspired by the player IronNoBank.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: In addition to the standard restrictions, Ultimate Iron[man/woman] are blocked from using the bank, and they drop all their items when they die.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: While you're on Tutorial Island, you can switch freely between being a standard Iron[man/woman], an Ultimate Iron[man/woman], a Hardcore Iron[man/woman] or a normal player.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Once you've left this island, you'll be able to find my colleague Adam in Lumbridge, but he'll only let you switch your restrictions downwards, not upwards.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: So he will let Hardcore Iron[man/woman] or Ultimate Iron[man/woman] downgrade to standard Iron[man/woman], and he'll let all types of Iron[man/woman] become normal players.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: You're a standard Iron[man/woman]. You can downgrade yourself to a normal player if you like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to change my Iron[man/woman] mode.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Make sure you've got your Iron[man/woman] settings all sorted before you leave Tutorial Island. Some things can't be changed later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to review my Iron[man/woman] mode.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any armour for me, please?

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: There you go. Wear it with pride.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Hello, [player name]. I'm the Iron[man/woman] tutor. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Iron[men/women].

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: When you play as an Iron[man/woman], you do everything for yourself. You don't trade with other players, or take their items, or accept their help.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: As an Iron[man/woman], you choose to have these restrictions imposed on you, so everyone knows you're doing it properly.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you think you have what it takes, you can choose to become a Hardcore Iron[man/woman].

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: In addition to the standard restrictions, Hardcore Iron[men/women] only have one life. In the event of a dangerous death, your Hardcore Iron[men/women] status will be downgraded to that of a standard Iron[man/woman], and your

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: stats will be frozen on the Hardcore Iron[man/woman] hiscores.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you have some friends, you could stand alone... Together, as Group Ironmen. Group Ironmen have the same restrictions as regular Iron[men/women] except you can trade your items with each other!

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you are a daring bunch, you could even try Hardcore Group Ironmen. With Hardcore Group Ironmen you have a set number of lives, when they reach zero, you will become regular Group Ironmen.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: If you ever decided to invite experienced players to your group, you would become Unranked Group Ironmen, which are no longer shown on the Group Ironman hiscores.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: For the ultimate challenge, you can choose to become an Ultimate Iron[man/woman], a game mode inspired by the player IronNoBank.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: In addition to the standard restrictions, Ultimate Iron[men/women] are blocked from using the bank, and they drop all their items when they die.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: While you're on Tutorial Island, you can switch freely between being a standard Iron[man/woman], an Ultimate Iron[man/woman], a Hardcore Iron[man/woman] or a normal player.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Once you've left this island, you'll be able to find my colleague Adam in Lumbridge, but he'll only let you switch your restrictions downwards, not upwards.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: So he will let Hardcore Iron[men/women] or Ultimate Iron[men/women] downgrade to standard Iron[men/women], and he'll let all types of Iron[man/woman] become normal players.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: You can choose to become an Iron[man/woman] while you're on Tutorial Island. Although you can't do that on this account, you might like to bear it in mind for the future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to change my Iron[man/woman] mode.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Make sure you've got your Iron[man/woman] settings all sorted before you leave Tutorial Island. Some things can't be changed later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to review my Iron[man/woman] mode.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any armour for me, please?

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: You're not an Iron[man/woman]. This armour is only for them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Sorry, Iron Man mode isn't available on Deadman worlds.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Hello there, [player name]. Everyone taking part in the Leagues II - Trailblazer is under Iron [Men/Women] restrictions once they leave Tutorial Island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to change my Iron Man mode.

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: If you're interested in the Fresh Start Worlds, you should know that you can't be an Iron Man on those.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are Fresh Start Worlds?

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: Fresh Start Worlds are worlds that have a fresh economy to build and fresh hiscores to chase.

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: They're a way to experience Old School RuneScape as if it were new, today!

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: They will last for 6 months, after which your account will be transfered to the main game and you can carry on playing as normal there.

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: There is a World First system, which are achievements only obtainable once on all worlds, so you can race against others for these!

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: If a global race is a bit too much, then there is also an Achievement Point system. You can compete against your friends to get the most points.

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: Other than that, it's the same Old School experience you know and love, with all the same content as the main game.

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: Do you still wish to proceed with selecting an Iron Man mode?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm not interested in Fresh Start Worlds.

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: That's okay. If you change your mind you can find out more about Fresh Start Worlds by speaking to the Magic Instructor, assuming you're not an ironman.

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: You'll have to remove any ironman status first by speaking to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, Fresh Start Worlds sound like my sort of thing!

lines.speaker: Iron Man tutor
lines.text: Lovely! You can talk to the Magic Instructor to find out more about Fresh Start Worlds.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: I need you to help me with this.

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Please give me your answer!

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Correct - I despise snakes!

lines.speaker: Ironman tutor
lines.text: Nope, not correct!
